description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.
examples:
Command Example
#
!gsuite-activity-search application_name=admin max_results=2
Context Example
#
{
"GSuite"
:

outputs.description: Unique qualifier if multiple events have the same time. GSuite.ActivitySearch.items.id.applicationName Application name to which the event belongs.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: The unique identifier for a Google Workspace account. GSuite.ActivitySearch.items.actor.callerType The type of actor.
outputs.name: GSuite.ActivitySearch.items.id.customerId

outputs.description: Can be the consumer_key of the requestor for OAuth 2LO API requests or an identifier for robot accounts. GSuite.ActivitySearch.items.events.type Type of event.
outputs.name: GSuite.ActivitySearch.items.actor.key

outputs.description: Name of the event. GSuite.ActivitySearch.items.events.parameters.name The name of the parameter.
outputs.name: GSuite.ActivitySearch.items.events.name

outputs.description: String value of the parameter. GSuite.ActivitySearch.items.actor.email The primary email address of the actor.
outputs.name: GSuite.ActivitySearch.items.events.parameters.value

outputs.description: The unique Google Workspace profile ID of the actor. GSuite.ActivitySearch.items.ipAddress IP address of the user performing the action.
outputs.name: GSuite.ActivitySearch.items.actor.profileId

outputs.description: Boolean value of the parameter. GSuite.ActivitySearch.items.events.parameters.multiValue String values of the parameter.
outputs.name: GSuite.ActivitySearch.items.events.parameters.boolValue

outputs.description: Token to specify the next page in the list.
outputs.name: GSuite.PageToken.ActivitySearch.nextPageToken
